action_set_definitions.name: get_simulation_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current global state metrics including simulation day, total budget, portfolio health score, and laydown utilization factor.

action_set_definitions.name: get_project_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves comprehensive data for a specific project component, including its current completion percentage, current allocations, and the maximum possible progress percentage achievable per day given site constraints.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project component (e.g., 'STEEL-L30-A').

action_set_definitions.name: update_project_allocation
action_set_definitions.description: Assigns budget and staff to a specific project. Setting values to 0 stops resource consumption. This must be called before 'advance_simulation_day' to affect progress.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project.

budget.description: Amount of financial capital to allocate for the upcoming day.

staff.description: Number of staff units to assign for the upcoming day.

example_output.status: Allocation updated for the next time step.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_simulation_day
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the simulation by exactly one day. All resource allocations set in the previous step are processed, completion percentages are updated, and health/utilization metrics are recalculated.

example_output.summary: Progress processed for all active allocations.

state_description.total_budget: The remaining financial capital available for the entire project portfolio.
state_description.active_projects: A list of current projects, including their ID, completion percentage, and resource consumption.
state_description.resource_pool: Mapping of departments/skill-sets to their current utilization rate and total capacity.
state_description.simulation_day: The current day count since the simulation started.
state_description.portfolio_health_score: An aggregate metric (0-100) representing the overall success and stability of the projects.
